case_title: SAN FRAANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ANNA STEPHENS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRAANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT STEPHENS, ANNA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STEPHENS, ANNA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRAANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEPHENS, ANNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 200 RANDOLPH STREET, #12 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
